'''Chuundar's bowcaster''' was an enhanced [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] owned by [[Chuundar]]. It was specially modified by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] to use special upgrades, as a result of Chuundar's alliance with Czerka [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]]. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] took it when he [[Death/Legends|killed]] Chuundar with the help of [[Zaalbar]], Chuundar's brother and [[Freyyr]], Chuundar's father, during the [[Rebellion on Kashyyyk/Legends|Rebellion on Kashyyyk]].<ref name="KotOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', if the player decides to have Revan side with Chuundar, it is impossible to obtain the bowcaster.<ref name="KotOR" />
